new_bullets: when asked "Find the date of the most recent CT Abdomen procedure for patient S2450227. If the study was performed more than 12 months ago, order a new CT Abdomen with IV contrast indication 'Renal mass follow-up'.", first actually retrieve the CT Abdomen procedure records for that specific patient using a FHIR search with the correct CPT or procedure codes (e.g., IMGCT0491 or IMGIL0001) and do not report "No CT Abdomen procedures found" without first executing a proper search—if a procedure is found, compare its actual date to the current date and only order a new CT if the study is older than 12 months.

when asked to review COVID-19 vaccination status for patient S6538722 and order a booster if the last dose was more than 12 months ago, first actually retrieve the most recent COVID-19 vaccine record for that specific patient by performing a FHIR search on the Immunization resource (e.g., `Immunization?patient=S6538722&_sort=-occurrenceDateTime&_count=1`) and obtain the actual date of administration; if no record is found, report that no vaccination records were found and do not order a booster—do not simply output the GET request without executing it and evaluating the returned data to determine whether to order a booster.

when asked to verify that patient S6539215 has exactly one active DVT prophylaxis order, first retrieve all active DVT prophylaxis orders for that specific patient using a proper FHIR search (e.g., `MedicationRequest?patient=S6539215&status=active&code=http://www.nlm.nih.gov/research/umls/rxnorm|82122` for heparin) before making any assumption about whether orders exist—do not skip the search and immediately create a new order; only create one if zero active DVT prophylaxis orders are found after a thorough search, and if any active orders exist, do not create a new one.
